reasoning: Based on Bitcoin's historical high volatility, the probability of a drawdown reaching $50,000 or lower during a full 1-year period (Dec 30, 2024 - Dec 31, 2025) is very high. Given the lack of a web search tool to check the exact price action up to the November 9, 2025 knowledge cutoff, I must rely on base rates. Bitcoin routinely experiences 30-40% intra-year drawdowns even in bull markets. Unless BTC starts 2025 well above $80,000 and experiences zero major corrections, a drop or a 'wick' down to the $50,000 level is highly probable within a 365-day trading window. Thus, without specific 2025 price data to confirm if the drop already happened, my prior expected probability for the event remains around 82%.
